Home.HeroTitle: End-to-end hospitality furniture solution from design to delivery
Home.ExpItem1Desc: Fire-resistant, stain resistant fabrics with > 50,000+ rub count and OEKO-TEX 100 standards available according to projects' request.
Home.ExpItem2Desc: E1 and E0 European formaldehyde emission standards for engineered wood furniture available according to projects' request.
Home.ExpItem3Desc: Engineering, material selection, and QC protect both design intent and durability.

About.HeroTitle: Hospitality manufacturing shaped by project experience.
About.HeroDesc: Registered in Singapore and operating in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, FURNY ASIA is a manufacturer and exporter of furniture and FF&E for high-end hospitality projects around the world.
About.IntroParagraph: Founded on more than 10 years of hospitality project management experience, FURNY ASIA combines international coordination with Vietnam-based manufacturing follow-through. Some of our factory partners have been established since 1994.
About.Stat1Desc: A structure set up for international project coordination and export work.
About.Stat2Title: Operating in Ho Chi Minh City
About.Stat2Desc: Close day-to-day factory follow-up where production decisions actually happen.
About.Stat3Desc: Hospitality knowledge informs how we assess design intent, quality, and timing.
About.Stat4Desc: Long-standing manufacturing capability supports demanding hospitality programs.
About.VisionTitle: "To be the leading partner for high-end hospitality projects in Asia, delivering integrated loose furniture and FF&E solutions through world-class manufacturing and execution excellence."
About.CoreTitle: Flexibility, trust, and professionalism guide every assignment.
About.Val1Desc: We adapt the manufacturing and supply approach to the project's scope, standards, and timeline instead of forcing a one-size-fits-all solution.
About.Val2Desc: Long-term relationships are built through transparency, reliability, and clear communication with both clients and manufacturing partners.
About.Val3Desc: We manage project requirements with the rigor expected on high-end hospitality and branded residential developments.

Expertise.HeroTitle: Elevating Hospitality: Custom FF&E Design & Detailed Manufacturing
Expertise.HeroDesc: Custom loose furniture and selected FF&E supply, managed with clear production and quality control.
Expertise.MfgTitle: A strong mix of craftsmanship, production capability, and manufacturing value.
Expertise.MfgDesc: Vietnam offers a strong combination of craftsmanship, production capability, and manufacturing value for hospitality loose furniture projects.
Expertise.MfgList1Desc: Established craftsmanship supported by modern factory capabilities.
Expertise.MfgList2Desc: Strong manufacturing efficiency for hospitality and residential projects.
Expertise.MfgList3Desc: Operations based in Ho Chi Minh City for direct factory coordination.
Expertise.ProcessTitle: Seven controlled steps keep approvals, production, and delivery on track.
Expertise.Step1Desc: Review design drawings, material specifications, and feasibility. Propose alternative materials to match the project's budget.
Expertise.Step2Title: Product Development and Technical Detailed Drawings
Expertise.Step2Desc: Detailed drawings for each furniture and coordination with the production team at the factory for review and confirmation.
Expertise.Step3Desc: Finishes, fabrics, hardware, and details are reviewed for approval.
Expertise.Step4Desc: Key pieces are validated before moving into full production.
Expertise.Step5Desc: Timeline, workmanship, finish quality, and sample compliance are monitored.
Expertise.Step6Desc: Inspections continue during production and again before shipment.
Expertise.Step7Desc: Packing, consolidation, and delivery are coordinated to the project site.

Projects.HeroDesc: Browse Furny Asia's project gallery featuring hospitality furniture and FF&E supply imagery.

Contact.HeroTitle: Tell us about your hospitality furniture or FF&E scope.
Contact.HeroDesc: You can also contact us directly if you prefer not to use the form.
Contact.IncludeTitle: What to include in your inquiry
Contact.Inc1: Project type and location: Hotel, resort, branded residence, or another hospitality-led development.
Contact.Inc2: Scope needed: Custom furniture only, selected FF&E supply, or a combined package.
Contact.Inc3: Timeline and standards: Lead time, delivery target, and any operator requirements.
Contact.FormSuccessDesc: Thank you for your inquiry. Our team will get back to you shortly.
